summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How Is Payment Handled?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Payments for fleet rentals work as follows:
Upfront Payment: Renters pay the entire rental amount upfront, which is held in an escrow account.
Daily Distribution: Lenders receive payments incrementally, with funds being released daily (00:00 UTC) during the rental period.
